zh: CN-ZA 标准时效为发货后 7-12 个工作日，清关延误不计入时效。
en: Standard CN-ZA lead time is 7-12 business days after dispatch; customs delays are excluded from the SLA.

zh: 受节假日影响，春节及南非国家假日期间时效延长至 15-20 个工作日，商家须提前告知买家。
en: During Chinese New Year and South African public holidays, lead time is extended to 15-20 business days; merchants must notify buyers in advance.

zh: 末端配送异常（如地址不全、无人签收）导致的延误，不纳入标准时效计算，需买家配合重新预约派送。
en: Delays caused by last-mile delivery failures (e.g. incomplete address, missed delivery) are excluded from the standard SLA and require buyer cooperation to reschedule.

zh: 时效投诉须在预计到货日后 3 个工作日内提交；超期未申诉视为正常完成。
en: Time-in-transit complaints must be filed within 3 business days after the estimated delivery date; no claim after that window is treated as normal completion.

zh: 双 11 促销季及圣诞档期，时效 SLA 自动放宽至 18 个工作日，不另行补偿。
en: During Double-11 and Christmas peak seasons, the SLA is automatically extended to 18 business days with no additional compensation.

zh: 经轨迹与仓查确认丢件后，按申报价值赔付，核实周期 5 个工作日。
en: After loss is confirmed via tracking and warehouse audit, compensation is paid at declared value within a 5-business-day verification window.

zh: 破损赔付需买家提供清晰开箱视频（不超过 60 秒）及照片；缺少证据不予受理。
en: Damage claims require a clear unboxing video (max 60 seconds) and photographs from the buyer; claims without evidence will not be accepted.

zh: 赔付金额上限为单票申报价值的 100%，不含运费；运费损失由商家自行商定。
en: The maximum compensation is 100% of the declared value per parcel, excluding freight; freight loss is settled directly between merchant and carrier.

zh: 轨迹 30 天无更新且海外仓核查确认无实物，方可认定丢件并启动赔付流程。
en: A parcel is confirmed lost if tracking shows no update for 30 days and the overseas warehouse audit confirms no physical stock; compensation process is then initiated.

zh: 同一商家单月破损率超过 2% 将触发货物包装审核，连续两月超标须更换包装方案。
en: If a merchant's monthly damage rate exceeds 2%, a packaging audit is triggered; two consecutive months above the threshold requires a revised packaging solution.

zh: 账单核对周期为自然月结算，次月 10 日前商家须提交对账单；逾期异议不予受理。
en: Billing reconciliation is monthly; merchants must submit dispute statements by the 10th of the following month. Late disputes will not be accepted.

zh: 计费重量取实重与体积重（长×宽×高 / 6000）的较大值，体积重系数可按需申请变更。
en: Chargeable weight is the greater of actual weight and volumetric weight (L×W×H / 6000); the volumetric divisor can be changed upon request.

zh: 附加费（燃油附加、旺季附加）按月公告价执行，不接受事后追溯调整。
en: Surcharges (fuel surcharge, peak-season surcharge) are applied at the published monthly rate and cannot be retroactively adjusted.

zh: 争议金额低于 50 元人民币的条目，系统自动冲销，不纳入正式申诉流程。
en: Line items with a disputed amount below CNY 50 are automatically written off by the system and excluded from the formal dispute process.

zh: 买家需为所有进口商品申报真实价值；虚报价值导致的罚款由收件方承担。
en: Buyers must declare the true value of all imported goods; any fines arising from under-declaration are borne by the consignee.

zh: 南非海关查验期间包裹滞留产生的仓储费，按查验日数每件计费，不纳入时效赔付。
en: Storage fees incurred during South African customs inspections are charged per day per parcel and are not covered under the SLA compensation policy.

zh: 商业发票须包含 HS 编码、原产地及商品描述（英文），缺失可能导致清关延误或退件。
en: Commercial invoices must include HS code, country of origin, and an English product description; missing fields may cause customs delays or return of the parcel.

zh: 清关失败且无法纠正的包裹，将在 14 个工作日内原路退回原寄地，退件运费由商家承担。
en: Parcels that fail customs clearance and cannot be rectified will be returned to origin within 14 business days; return freight is borne by the merchant.

zh: 买家拒收导致的退件，退件运费及仓储费全部由商家承担，不予补偿。
en: Returns caused by buyer refusal are fully charged to the merchant, including return freight and warehousing fees; no compensation is provided.

zh: 退件商品须在南非海外仓签收后 7 个工作日内完成质检，质检结果将推送至商家系统。
en: Returned goods must undergo quality inspection within 7 business days of receipt at the South Africa overseas warehouse; results are pushed to the merchant system.

zh: 质检合格的退件可申请重新发货，重发时效与首次发货 SLA 相同；不合格品由商家自行处置。
en: Returned items passing quality inspection can be reshipped under the same SLA as the original shipment; defective items are disposed of by the merchant.

zh: 退件声明（RMA 编号）须在发起退件前通过平台提交；无 RMA 编号的包裹将被拒收。
en: A Return Merchandise Authorization (RMA) number must be submitted via the platform before initiating any return; parcels without an RMA number will be refused.

zh: 商家可通过平台「订单追踪」模块实时查看轨迹，更新频率为每 4 小时一次。
en: Merchants can track shipments in real time via the platform's Order Tracking module, which refreshes every 4 hours.

zh: 客服工作时间为北京时间周一至周五 09:00-18:00，法定节假日顺延，紧急问题可发送邮件至客服邮箱获得 24 小时响应。
en: Customer service is available Monday to Friday, 09:00-18:00 Beijing Time (excluding public holidays); urgent issues can be emailed to the service mailbox for a 24-hour response.

zh: 新商家须完成平台认证（营业执照 + 海外收款账号）后方可开通 CN-ZA 线路发货权限。
en: New merchants must complete platform verification (business license + overseas payment account) before being granted access to the CN-ZA shipping route.

zh: 平台对接支持 API 和 CSV 批量导入两种方式，API 文档版本 v2.3 起包含退件回传接口。
en: Platform integration supports both API and CSV bulk import; the API documentation from version v2.3 onwards includes the return callback endpoint.
